positive: Stylized minimalist representation of a cheerful, stylized mountain landscape meeting a calm, stylized sunset ocean. The mountains should feature clean, geometric silhouettes of various peaks. The sky should transition through vibrant gradients of warm coral, deep lavender, and soft peach, contrasting against deep indigo. Foreground elements include simplified, abstract wave lines and sparse stylized tropical foliage silhouettes (like palm fronds). Composition must be centered, highly graphic, and designed for maximum impact on fabric. Use thick, clean linework, flat color blocking, and a retro/mid-century modern aesthetic, emphasizing strong, clean negative space. Vibrant, print-quality colors, high contrast, vector art style.
negative: realistic, photographic, blurry, gradient, text, logos, messy, low resolution, bad anatomy, signature, watermark, extra limbs, artifacts
